feedback.text: Hello. In regards of the Digital Fairness act and the Stop Killing Games initiative please take act of this initiative because companies like EA, Ubisoft and more are planning to delete games that are bought by us consumers with money just to later not being able to play them because they are discontinued witch is not fair. Please take this initiative in consideration and protect us consumers from greddy companies that dont care about us. Thank you and may you have a good day.
